RateLimiting._comment: Local e2e suites (Playwright/Cypress) drive ~90 per-test API logins + silent refreshes from 127.0.0.1; the base 20/min per-IP auth limit starves them (same rationale as the Dev override). Production keeps the strict default.

ConnectionStrings.DefaultConnection: Host=localhost;Port=5433;Database=nekohoa;Username=nekohoa;Password=nekohoa;Maximum Pool Size=20;Minimum Pool Size=1;Connection Idle Lifetime=30

Jwt._comment: 016-A FR-A9: ephemeral local-dev throwaway; never used by any deployed environment (prod/dev source the signing key from the managed secret store). For a real local key, override via appsettings.Secrets.json (gitignored) or the Jwt__Secret env var.

Stripe._comment: Non-functional placeholders so strict startup validation (008) passes locally. Override real keys via appsettings.Secrets.json (gitignored) or environment variables.
